news.t: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
Basic Materials ETFs Poised for a September Bounce

holdings.infoBox: UYM is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Materials (UYM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Materials Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of companies in the basic materials sector that includes production of certain metals, chemicals and paper products. UYM was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares and ProFunds, premier providers of leveraged and inverse funds, announced plans to change the underlying indices for a combined 53 sector ETFs and mutual fu...

data.title: Basic Materials ETFs Poised for a September Bounce
data.text: Underperforming materials stocks may receive a boost from supportive policy action in September. Trade the sector using these ETFs.
